flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Union College rose 16% between 2000 and 2003 ($25.0k → $28.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Union College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($61.7k → $69.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Union College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
